newsletter_markdown:
### Major M&A Deals
Recent M&A activity in the FMCG industry includes the acquisition of a majority stake in personal care brand [Phitku by Ananta Capital](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxOb0d2S3c5TndXdnJ3MWJmS2RzZWdILW9NU1EwcTNmNV9zcS1hQzlWRjlld1NEUVVjQ2RyNmVad2xmcHF3eUZ0N0FiWFU3LXp2c2EtQmg3TURDclpERy1PWE5BQlFQYjZUSFZrNTNrNFBXOExOOHpXZTlWX0h4S09jQzFyVjlyOG1RN3FzVVVsaFZjOVhrSURZ?oc=5) as reported by [Inc42](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxOb0d2S3c5TndXdnJ3MWJmS2RzZWdILW9NU1EwcTNmNV9zcS1hQzlWRjlld1NEUVVjQ2RyNmVad2xmcHF3eUZ0N0FiWFU3LXp2c2EtQmg3TURDclpERy1PWE5BQlFQYjZUSFZrNTNrNFBXOExOOHpXZTlWX0h4S09jQzFyVjlyOG1RN3FzVVVsaFZjOVhrSURZ?oc=5). Additionally, [DKSH acquired Gale & Cosm](https://news.google.?oc=5) as per [Indian Chemical News](https://news.google.?oc=5), and [IKS Health acquired TruBridge](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxQTzY1UHNsbGNQYUdTQjRCWG9XenhLWU43NTl0VGxJbnYtSkhKRzFEcVhsUVpaRWdtQzEyRUdfcUFZSDY1b3ZBVE5xckpsTG1rTDFGekN4MWgxRWxWWnNyUk11N3NWcmQ0TUltSUpob05TZGotMkxrVmhKYVpBeGxSb3lVVFRFQlM4RHRPd0Znbw?oc=5) in a $557M deal as reported by [Modern Healthcare](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxQTzY1UHNsbGNQYUdTQjRCWG9XenhLWU43NTl0VGxJbnYtSkhKRzFEcVhsUVpaRWdtQzEyRUdfcUFZSDY1b3ZBVE5xckpsTG1rTDFGekN4MWgxRWxWWnNyUk11N3NWcmQ0TUltSUpob05TZGotMkxrVmhKYVpBeGxSb3lVVFRFQlM4RHRPd0Znbw?oc=5).

### Investment Highlights
Notable investments include [PepsiCo's Rs 1,266-cr investment](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxPaklXbjhEZmJQTl9tZXZrbXg0Y0M2STRvZV9PbHp3MENDNnFxX1lnbVFjXzhRUlZjUGtzbGhENEdWUDE4a0EzUUlqWFdkR2psNkN0SjAtQTdsa1VQZ2pSbzFxemE3VVF1SUplNHFaejhITXdQSExYYTc1bHJkUWVBWmVuRUhkRU0yR0RscTlJSGVjNElwc3J2OUhib0FHRE5zR2JhOU50aUVQMTVQeG41MUg0UQ?oc=5) in a flavor plant in Ujjain, India, as reported by [India Retailing](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxPaklXbjhEZmJQTl9tZXZrbXg0Y0M2STRvZV9PbHp3MENDNnFxX1lnbVFjXzhRUlZjUGtzbGhENEdWUDE4a0EzUUlqWFdkR2psNkN0SjAtQTdsa1VQZ2pSbzFxemE3VVF1SUplNHFaejhITXdQSExYYTc1bHJkUWVBWmVuRUhkRU0yR0RscTlJSGVjNElwc3J2OUhib0FHRE5zR2JhOU50aUVQMTVQeG41MUg0UQ?oc=5), and [Nestlé's $688 million investment](https://news.google.?oc=5) in an AI-driven regional coffee hub, as reported by [Media OutReach Newswire](https://news.google.?oc=5).

### Emerging Trends
The FMCG industry is witnessing significant investments in technology and expansion. [10Beauty's robotic manicure raised $23.5M in funding](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivAFBVV95cUxOTkEyLV8wbWJ0U3Y0ekR1N0hkV0xJN08xTm5uSXdzVGpBOFQ2SVQwQld2dzN4Z3JKMk5GcWFEYXNMZV9iT3EwMXVjWUU3WHhjVk9MTVFXMzloNGpjT1U3akN5SEhlVzIyQlpOQlVSY29aSXdCR0NDU285YXJIWFlLd3V3cWd4S3JITjZUSlJWajIwOTBjbW5sZlQ5Vy1OU25icTl4X01GdWsyN010Ry1FTTJMVG1EcXR2RUROXw?oc=5) led by Story Ventures, as reported by [Beauty Packaging](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivAFBVV95cUxOTkEyLV8wbWJ0U3Y0ekR1N0hkV0xJN08xTm5uSXdzVGpBOFQ2SVQwQld2dzN4Z3JKMk5GcWFEYXNMZV9iT3EwMXVjWUU3WHhjVk9MTVFXMzloNGpjT1U3akN5SEhlVzIyQlpOQlVSY29aSXdCR0NDU285YXJIWFlLd3V3cWd4S3JITjZUSlJWajIwOTBjbW5sZlQ5Vy1OU25icTl4X01GdWsyN010Ry1FTTJMVG1EcXR2RUROXw?oc=5).

### Key Takeaways
Key highlights from recent deal activity in the FMCG industry include:
- [Marico's acquired brands earned ₹2,375 crore in FY26](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxQeVIyNVhhUGtTcDMyU21sMWVrX3VFcmRWazBrU3BSVTQ3eHlvLXRQSnMyZERzN2ptdHZoVDhDdFlGWmFaRVNzOG4xT3VvMmJTemRrbnNqcExTVWpUYm56WlJ6cy0tUGdVbElPY2Rxa0w2QUxJTDV2UGxxNDFDMUVCdE1lbWVYS3V6WkkxSHJGdw?oc=5), as reported by [Lapaas Voice](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxQeVIyNVhhUGtTcDMyU21sMWVrX3VFcmRWazBrU3BSVTQ3eHlvLXRQSnMyZERzN2ptdHZoVDhDdFlGWmFaRVNzOG4xT3VvMmJTemRrbnNqcExTVWpUYm56WlJ6cy0tUGdVbElPY2Rxa0w2QUxJTDV2UGxxNDFDMUVCdE1lbWVYS3V6WkkxSHJGdw?oc=5).
- [Plum Beauty plans a $75-100 million record fundraise](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxQQndRYnRrX2g3UE9kZlB0bm51R2RHQjVMMGIybFhTaVpwMFFmLWx5R3pmdVIxaU0xYy05SzY3Z19FWmVqSjctMXcxYWd2bWY3a2U0ZXpOYU1kbVFhaEgtVGxnRHVRWnE5aW56RGtma09PMUdzRl9lc1d1X2tuOUhfeEJ0T0VBQzQ?oc=5), as per [Lapaas Voice](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxQQndRYnRrX2g3UE9kZlB0bm51R2RHQjVMMGIybFhTaVpwMFFmLWx5R3pmdVIxaU0xYy05SzY3Z19FWmVqSjctMXcxYWd2bWY3a2U0ZXpOYU1kbVFhaEgtVGxnRHVRWnE5aW56RGtma09PMUdzRl9lc1d1X2tuOUhfeEJ0T0VBQzQ?oc=5).
